item.title: Learn, todo and done 18-22/1/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc Todo - Project repo, doc Meeting on 21/1 a 2pm to confirm the requirement and understand Editor’s workflow Todo Link previews #428 Backgorund reading: DesignPatternsPHP Factory Method Decorator Done Reference
